description: A dramatic nocturnal landscape in Yosemite. A large tree dominates the center, its trunk and branches illuminated by moonlight breaking through clouds above and the warm orange glow of a campfire at its base. Small figures gather around the fire, which casts flickering light on the surrounding rock face. A waterfall is visible in the misty middle distance at the right. The scene is overwhelmingly dark, with the dual light sources of moon and fire creating a stark contrast.
